sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current eye positions after pressing DOWN.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current eye positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Eye id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Also check border state
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'B']:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        if min(rows) in [0, 63]:
            print(f"Border {n['color']} id={n['id']}: rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
